evals.name: greenfield-ops-dashboard
evals.prompt: I want to build an internal dashboard for our ops team — grill me on requirements.
evals.expected_output: BRD.md and GLOSSARY.md created in repo root. BRD has stakeholders, scope (in/out), 3 functional requirements with acceptance criteria and MoSCoW priorities, non-functional requirements, constraints, assumptions, risks. GLOSSARY defines 'Incident' (PagerDuty, not Jira), 'Ops Team' (SRE, not customer support), 'Deploy' (production only). Skill detected greenfield mode and stated it.

assertions.text: BRD has In Scope and Out of Scope
BRD has acceptance criteria for FR1 (<2s load)
GLOSSARY clarifies Incident is PagerDuty (not Jira)

evals.name: existing-codebase-subscription
evals.prompt: Help me write a BRD for adding subscription billing to this app.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects existing codebase. Explores PaywayApp source. Updates existing GLOSSARY.md with new terms (Subscription, Plan, Renewal, Cancellation, Dunning). Distinguishes Cancellation (end-of-period termination) from Refund. Cross-references refund.py limitation. Builds BRD.md with 4 FRs, acceptance criteria, priorities.

assertions.text: GLOSSARY.md still exists and was updated
Transcript shows codebase exploration (refund.py or invoice.py mentioned)

evals.name: inflight-refunds-contradiction
evals.prompt: We need to scope a new feature for handling refunds.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects in-flight mode. Surfaces code/docs contradiction (refund_service.py NotImplementedError vs docs/refunds.md claiming support). BRD captures partial refund FRs with approval workflow. GLOSSARY distinguishes Refund from Chargeback.

assertions.text: Transcript surfaces code vs docs contradiction
